text: Morning Jarvis, help me plan my day. What's on the calendar?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Saturday, May 17. No work meetings today. You have gardening in the front walkway and Sarah wanting to work on her design course.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Planning a street block party soon. Sarah and Kim are organizing the Memorial block party. We need to do this more often.
title: Social Update

text: I've mapped the locations. Great neighborhood event. I can help organize the signup sheets. Have a great time!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Quick log: Prepping school lunches for the week. Grilling steaks and chicken on the deck tonight. That should cover us for the week.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Interesting. Healthy choices are great. Perfect grilling weather! I've added hickory chips to the Costco list. Let me know how the recipe turns out.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Jarvis, Lily had her gymnastics class at the community center. Lily's gymnastics class signup opens online tomorrow. It's a busy schedule but worth it.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Logged that. That's a big step. I've added the signup time to your alerts so you can secure a spot. He's doing great with Mrs. Patterson.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Just wanted to mention that the kitchen sink area has a problem. The garbage disposal is jammed with a cherry pit. Always something to fix.
title: Household Update

text: Got it, Mike. Automations are great when they work. Safety first: turn off power under the sink, then use the hex wrench. The automations are running now.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Jarvis, Reading a new book before bed. It was a really interesting history episode. Ready to relax for the weekend.
title: Personal Update

text: Understood. I've adjusted the local settings. History podcasts are great for garage time. I can suggest tech ones too. Let me know if you need anything else.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Quick update: Sarah is planning a playdate for Ethan. We discussed positive discipline strategies for toddler tantrums. They keep us on our toes.
title: Parenting Update

text: Interesting. Bedtime can be a challenge. Consistency is key. Establishing clear, warm boundaries is highly effective. Parenting is definitely a journey.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Just wanted to mention that modified the smart-home alert integrations. I aligned it and tracked Jupiter's moons. My ADHD hyperfocus really kicked in.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Interesting. Space science and tech is a great focus. Jupiter tracking is a classic target! I've saved the coordinate parameters. I've saved your custom configurations.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Played golf with Jake Morrison today. Dave Nguyen invited us for a backyard BBQ. Always a fun neighborhood crowd.
title: Social Update

text: Interesting. Catan is always a good time. Fun! Dave loves IPAs. I can recommend some local microbreweries. Let me know if you need any printouts.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Just wanted to mention that cooking dinner for the kids tonight. We want to try a home-cooked chicken parmesan on Thursday. That should cover us for the week.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Got it, Mike. Let's organize the menu. Recipe saved. I've added marinara and mozzarella to the grocery list. I'll set a reminder for lunch prep.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Ethan has soccer practice with Frisco FC today. Ethan is practicing Jingle Bells for the upcoming piano recital. The kids are staying active.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Got it, Mike. Great progress. He's making fast progress. I can set a practice timer to help him prepare. He's doing great with Mrs. Patterson.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Doing some cleaning around the house. I adjusted the automated lighting sensors to save energy. It is running much better now.
title: Household Update

text: I can help troubleshoot that. Smart move. I've updated the Jarvis automation dim rules after 9 PM. I'll update the home maintenance log.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Quick log: Listening to a podcast in the garage. Trying to unwind after a stressful day. Just taking it easy tonight.
title: Personal Update

text: Sure thing! Good way to wrap up the day. Reading is a great way to disconnect. I've set a quiet sleep timer. I've saved the reading stats.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Quick update: Lily refused to eat her dinner today. Cooper had a small accident on the living room rug during crate training. Hope tomorrow is a bit easier.
title: Parenting Update

text: That sounds like a sweet moment. Puppy training takes patience. Try using positive reinforcement and regular outdoor breaks. Parenting is definitely a journey.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick log: Researching rover power systems in depth. I quantized a local LLM to run in memory. My ADHD hyperfocus really kicked in.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Logged that. That is a clean implementation. Quantizing 70B models is heavy coding. I've saved settings in your scratchpad. I'll monitor the API alerts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Jarvis, logging today's journal. Pretty relaxing weekend day. Ethan had fun with soccer, and Lily did great. Ethan had fun with soccer, and Lily did great. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Logged that for you. See you in the morning, Mike.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
